votes.rationale: Motion-0043 successfully proved the third live Claude usage path for dev-jai-nexus on a real bounded code-edit workflow. The validated setup routine, generated Claude bootstrap pack, generated task-local code surface pack, and active motion package worked together as a coherent implementation setup path with explicit local validation.

The motion stayed appropriately scoped. It did not redesign the generators or drift into multi-provider orchestration, and instead produced concrete operational evidence that the task-local code pack reduces file-selection friction while preserving canonical source truth.

The implementation is coherent and strategically useful. The third live usage report and passalong artifact now show that the full current Claude stack supports a real bounded code edit with manageable setup friction, bounded file context, and clear local validation expectations.
